problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: TenderLens AI — Automated Tender Eligibility Evaluation with Human Verification
summary: Design a platform to automate first reading of tender documents, extract eligibility criteria, evaluate bidders, flag ambiguous cases for human review, and generate explainable evaluation reports.
optimization_claims: Reduces tender evaluation time from days to hours
Ensures every bidder is checked against the same criteria consistently
Produces a fully auditable report suitable for formal government procurement decisions
